name: AcnoShield Face Wash
short: A clarifying acne-control face wash with salicylic acid, niacinamide, and AHA+BHA to unclog pores and reduce oil.
description: AcnoShield is a clarifying acne-control face wash formulated for oily, combination, and blemish-prone skin. Salicylic acid (BHA) penetrates pores to dissolve excess sebum and dead skin, while glycolic and lactic acids (AHA) gently exfoliate the surface. Niacinamide helps even tone and calm visible redness, and aloe vera keeps skin comfortable — never stripped. Dissolving exfoliation beads give a satisfying physical polish without microtears. Use daily for visibly clearer, smoother skin in two to four weeks.
benefits: Fights acne with salicylic acid (BHA) and AHA blend
Unclogs pores and reduces excess oil without over-drying
Niacinamide calms redness and evens skin tone
Gentle exfoliation with dissolving beads — no microtears
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Follow with moisturizer. Suitable for oily, combination, and acne-prone skin.
